Body.Content:
Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention and Information Protection Auto-labeling capabilities now extend to non-Microsoft connected apps (e.g., Google Workspace, Box, Dropbox, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Amazon Web Services, and Cisco Webex). The conditions and actions supported for each of these applications vary.

GA date: September CY2026

Preview date: July CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - Data Security for non-Microsoft connected apps
